calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-20-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion to compel responses to discovery is granted. Defendant is ordered to provide complete verified responses to special interrogatories and request for production of documents without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2007 Continued To Oct-12-07 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
